text: Pregnant woman trapped on the rooftop, water is still rising fast, no food since morning.
My father is not breathing after we pulled him out of the floodwater. Please help!
Elderly man has heavy bleeding from a deep leg cut by a tin sheet, blood is soaking the cloth.
We are four people safe on the second floor but we have run out of drinking water.
My child has a high fever and we ran out of her medicine, roads are underwater.
Which road can I take to reach the nearest shelter? The road to Agrabad looks flooded.
A snake bit my brother's foot near the water, his foot is swelling.
Diabetic patient is out of insulin and stuck at home, feeling very weak.
